description: SP4096 + Depth Recurrence (blocks 4-5) + Parallel Residuals + MuonEq-R + QK-Gain 5.0 + XSA-all + Self-Gen GPTQ + Score-First TTT
techniques: SP4096 tokenizer (4096 vocab vs 1024 — more bytes per token → better BPB)
Depth recurrence: blocks 4-5 repeated a second time (free depth, zero extra params)
Parallel residuals: attention and MLP run in parallel from same input (PaLM-style)
MuonEq-R: row-norm equalization before Newton-Schulz5 orthogonalization
QK-Gain initialized to 5.0 (sharper attention, matches top submissions)
XSA-all: all blocks share K,V from block 0
Score-first causal TTT on last 3 blocks (legal)
Higher weight decay 0.085 (Kevin Clark's high-WD config)
